title: ⚡ The 'Lighning Fast' Performance Update! 🚀
message: Experience pure speed! We've optimized internal saving loops and animations to give you a flawlessly fluid vault experience.
points: ⚡ Faster Quick Saving: Saving links, media, notes, and documents from external share menus is now near-instantaneous.
🪄 Fluid Tab Switches: Shifting between content source types (Link, File, Media, Note) is completely smooth and lag-free.
🛠️ Under-The-Hood Tuning: Upgraded local caching systems to load extensive folders and heavy layouts without a single drop in performance.

title: ✔️ The 'Inbox Zero' Update! 📥
message: Keep your vault clutter-free! You can now mark items as Read and hide them from your main feed.
points: ✔️ Mark as Read: Easily track what you've already watched, read, or used by marking items as 'Completed'.
👁️ Smart Hide Toggle: Tap the new eye icon on the home screen to instantly hide your completed items and focus on the new stuff.
📂 Dedicated Read Vault: Access all your completed items perfectly categorized in the new 'Reads' bottom-sheet inside the Folders Tab.
⚙️ Engine Upgrades: We've optimized the local database for lightning-fast sorting and seamless tag filtering.

title: 📊 Live Filter Counters & Better Flow! ✨
message: We've added context right to your dashboard tabs! Track your data volume instantly without clicking back and forth.
points: 📊 Live Content Badges: Horizontal filter chips now display live badges tracking your exact saved volume counts across links, files, notes, and media.
🧹 Tap-to-Clear Fields: Instantly erase long link inputs or description mistakes using clean, fast zero-out suffix buttons.
⌨️ Smart Keyboard Unfocus: Integrated text input actions to automatically dismiss soft keyboards the second you submit your search queries.

title: 🎲 Welcome to Vault Roulette! ✨
message: Stop hoarding and start exploring! We've added a stunning new way to rediscover the links and files you've saved.
points: 📱 The Reel Experience: Swipe vertically through your forgotten saves in an immersive, full-screen reel.
🎨 Rich Color Previews: Experience beautiful, dynamic background gradients that adapt to your saved images.
⚡ Clean Up & Consume: Instantly open forgotten links or trash them with one tap while scrolling.
💎 UI Polish: Smoother animations and enhanced premium visual touches across the app.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest SaveAnything features.
points: 🔔 In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly when you open your vault.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even faster link saving experience.
